reviews.review_description:
I enjoy the availability of my email while using my headset, but I am not gonna be forced into paying for something that should be grandfathered or like anything else a free version and a premium version which makes more sense. You can go ahead and terminate spike if you want I don’t care. I’ll just go back to using my phone. 
￼
Seems like a great concept but in 2021 who pays for an email client?

developer_response.body:
Hi Masterchop,
Thanks for taking the time to leave us a review. 
Spike is much more than an email client. We've turned your existing email into a powerful collaboration tool. You can use Spike to chat with your team, manage (all) your calendars, have video meetings or audio calls, and work on collaborative docs and to dos on your own or with your team. Plus, Spike is entirely free for personal use. If you have any questions, feel free to chat with us --> chat@spikenow.com

reviews.review_description:
This should be free.

Edit:  I’ll give it a second try and explore everything that’s free.

developer_response.body:
Hi Lester,
You can definitely use Spike for free. Spike is entirely for free for personal use (and for students), for as long as you want for as many personal accounts as you want. 
We'd be happy to help you out if you have any questions. Feel free to shoot our team a message to chat@spikenow.com

reviews.review_description:
I am fine by paying one time for the app, but having to pay a MINUMUM 5 dollars a month for having 3 email accounts connected is utter stupidity.
Even worse is 10dollars a month for unlimited accounts, something witch is free pretty mutch anywhere else.
